name: Banana Nut Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and 2 tablespoons of margarine in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In another bowl, mix together the cream cheese, sugar, mashed bananas, and 1/4 cup melted margarine until well blended.
3. Add the eggs to the mixture one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Stir in the chopped walnuts and pour the batter over the prepared crust.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 40 minutes.
6. Loosen the edges of the cake from the rim of the pan before removing it.
7. Melt the chocolate pieces and margarine with water over low heat, stirring until smooth. Drizzle the melted mixture over the cheesecake.
8. Chill the cheesecake before serving.
